subject: Re: USVI Bound
body:
call me in the morning early

----- Original Message ----
From: Rahna Jalashgar <rjalashgar@nysgmail.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, May 23, 2007 3:57:41 PM
Subject: FW: USVI Bound


-----Original Message-----
From: Buckland, Teri [mailto:tbuckland@islecap.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, May 23, 2007 3:57 PM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Cc: Farkas, Andrew
Subject: FW: USVI Bound

Andrew,

Rona - at Jeffery's office has sent this message to him.

Thanks,
Teri 

-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew
Sent: Wednesday, May 23, 2007 4:35 PM
To: Buckland, Teri
Subject: Fw: USVI Bound

Pls call jeffery epstein's office and make sure thy forward the attached
email to him. 

----- Original Message -----
From: Farkas, Andrew
To: 'lesley@nysgllc.com' <lesley@nysgllc.com>
Sent: Wed May 23 16:11:48 2007
Subject: USVI Bound

I am in puerto rico about to meet with bonilla, silva-puras etc re the
san juan waterfront redevelopment. I have a couple of questions: (a) I
assume you never heard anything further re roosevelt roads, (b) I am
coming to st thomas tonight - leave on the 12:30 american flight - do I
get to see you? (c) I have been trying to get de jongh on the phone for
2 weeks now - we had a dste to talk yesterday but he was a no show - can
you pls ask his wife or someone to ask him to please speak with me? I
hate the game of having to chase him around for weeks only to get no
answers. Thx.
--------------------------------------------------------
